interpretation: Physical survival is not a net age-price schedule; equality is shown only as a prohibited boundary case.
Transparent finite-life candidate retained from S12D-A, but no independent age-price evidence selects straight-line value decay.
The geometric form and delta=1/L are protocol assumptions, not identified by the locked downstream observations.

Locked current-cost CFC anchors an aggregate declining-balance rate, but an aggregate CFC/net-stock ratio does not identify a vintage age-price profile or establish a BEA asset-specific depreciation form.
The blend measures schedule dependence and has no independent baseline interpretation.
